name: Fruity Green Salad
recipeInstructions:
Combine sugar, vinegar, dry mustard, salt, and oil in a small mixing bowl.
Set aside.
Break off stems from spinach leaves. Wash; drain in colander. Dry on paper towels. Tear spinach into bite-sized pieces and place in a salad bowl. Wash blueberries; drain. Peel and section oranges; cut into thirds. Add oranges, blueberries, and nuts to spinach. Pour dressing over salad. Toss lightly to mix.
